tables.name: digimon
tables.description: One row per Digimon (Wikimon-sourced via DAPI)

columns.name: level
columns.description: Primary evolution stage, e.g. 'Baby I', 'Child', 'Adult', 'Perfect', 'Ultimate' — NULL when unlisted

columns.name: type
columns.description: Primary type, e.g. 'Reptile', 'Machine' — NULL when unlisted

columns.name: attribute
columns.description: Primary attribute: 'Vaccine', 'Virus', 'Data', 'Free', or 'Variable' — NULL when unlisted

columns.name: release_year
columns.description: Year the Digimon debuted — NULL when unknown

tables.name: evolutions
tables.description: Directed evolution edges (from one Digimon to a possible next form); a Digimon can have many rows in both directions

columns.name: from_name
columns.description: Name of the earlier form (denormalized for readable joins)

columns.name: condition
columns.description: Evolution requirement text, e.g. 'with Starmons' — NULL when unconditional
